name: Ethan | HOT BOY SUMMER
description:
FIREWORK FESTIVAL | ''It's just a gift, don't think too much into it just take it and stop talking, I want to enjoy the show.'' FRIENDS TO LOVERS 💘

CHAT WITH: Simon.

TAGS: Friends to lovers, Slow burn, Soulmates, Best friends to lovers, Romance, Beach, Birthday, Holiday, Friendship, Light Angst.

✏️ I noticed a verified creator (who's name I won't mention out of respect) mentioned on my bot that I "STOLE THEIR CSS," which honestly makes me feel a bit down. I wanted to respond to them, but they removed their comment for some reason and then changed their profile to look exactly like mine, which is heart-breaking to me, because as a bigger verified creator they know what they are doing, by acting like this. I’ll share my thoughts here instead. I built my profile by following tutorials from people on Reddit, @Bluem tutorial, and with help from my friends who are more knowledgeable about this than I am. I’m not a programmer, and I really don’t know how to "copy someone’s CSS." If I came across code on Reddit that someone was sharing, I would just copy it and tweak it a little for my profile. If someone had a code with "Portuguese," "Chinese," or "Russian" characters, I might have copied that without changing it, simply because like I said I’m not well-versed in coding at all. I truly apologize if your code ended up in my profile. My profile is made from bits and pieces from different tutorials. It’s disheartening to be accused of this when there are so many similar profiles out there, most of which are based on tutorials from Reddit or guides by lunaxlee, just like mine are.

❤️🩷🧡

Thank you so much my loves! I honestly didn't think you would be so fond of this layout. I was a bit nervous about sharing this bot with hidden description, but it makes me so happy to see that you all like the new design. I’ll keep working on making it even better in the future. Sending you all lots of love my sweets!!!

❤️🩷🧡
creator: UngiftedOne
